---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new functionality (new widget, new modifier, new runtime API).
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case

<!--
What are you trying to build? Concrete first — "I want to render a
horizontally-paged carousel of cards with snap behavior" beats
"better LazyRow support."
-->

## Why current schema/API doesn't support it

<!--
Walk through what you tried. If a widget exists that's close, explain
what's missing. If you tried a workaround in the host or guest layer,
say what failed.
-->

## Proposal

<!--
Sketch of the API. For new widgets: prop list + parent–child rules.
For new modifiers: signature + which widgets it applies to. For runtime
APIs: function shape + when it gets called.

Wire-format note: any change to an existing @Widget / @Modifier must be
additive (new property with default, new tag). Removals or tag reorders
break the 1.0.x wire-format commitment.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else you thought about, and why this is better. -->

## Willingness to contribute
